# updateDefaultAddress

Replaces a customer's default shipping address.

**Returns** [`Customer!`](../types/objects/Customer.md)

## Arguments

- **`address`**: [`AddressInput!`](../types/inputs/AddressInput.md)
- **`customerId`**: [`ID!`](../types/scalars/ID.md)
